company_description: EQIQ is a management consulting firm specializing in go-to-market strategy, sales enablement, positioning and messaging, and team leadership transformation for technology companies.

products.name: Go-To-Market Strategy Consulting
products.description: Assessment and development of end-to-end go-to-market strategy including demand generation, routes-to-market, sales enablement, and ecosystem development for technology companies.

products.name: Sales Enablement Services
products.description: Development of core sales kits and playbooks including first-call customer decks, battlecards, and supporting sales tools for technology vendors.

products.name: Positioning & Messaging Consulting
products.description: Development of clear, unique, and compelling company and product positioning with objectives of differentiating clients from competitors.

products.name: Team Leadership & Transformation
products.description: Interim marketing and product management leadership services including building virtual resources and hiring full-time employees for young companies or corporate business units.

page_contents.partner_portal_page: EQIQ partners – Management Consultants – Marketing, Leadership, Product Management Search for: STRATEGY & EXECUTION TRANSFORMING Leadership, Differentiation, Accountability & Passion INSPIRE Innovation, Customers, Markets & Most of all People INFLUENCE Thinking, Perception, Decisions, Change! POSSIBILITIES Infinite Ideation, Visioneer to Reality Go-To-Market Strategy Assessment and development of all points GTM strategy including demand generation / awareness, routes-to-market engagement focus, sales enablement tools plan and ecosystem development requirements. Sales Enablement Development of core sales kit / play book including a) 1st call customer deck, b) batltlecards, and more. Team Leadership & Transformation Interim marketing and product management leadership including building out of virtual resources and hiring FTE to create the foundational assets for young companies or corporations business units. Positioning & Messaging Development of clear, unique and compelling company and product positioning with objectives of de-positioning competitors. Gary Lyng General Partner & Founder Gary Lyng is an innovative and inspiring marketing and product leader with 20+ years of extensive experience and success in delivering industry disrupting enterprise products. A Proven change-agent, defining and executing 360 degree go-to-market, accelerated revenue growth attaining market leadership with significant market buzz. Vince Mendillo General partner & Co-founder Vince Mendillo is a senior Software and Technology Executive with 25 years in Fortune 50 and start-up companies leading strategy, product management, engineering, and proven multibillion-dollar P&L management. Experienced with entire product and development lifecycle from concept to release having shipped over 20 global, innovative, and category defining commercial enterprise products and platforms at scale. Henri Richard – EVP WW Field and Customer Operations at NetApp Gary is a creative, convincing and articulate marketing executive with a great passion for his business. He is easy to work with, focused on the team success and great at defining the big picture. I would recommend him to organizations in need of a marketing executive that must deliver a balance between strategic thinking and tactical execution Chief Learning Officer | Organizational Development & Human Performance DocuSign Vince is one of those strong business leaders that understand how to drive with vision and focus on the key details.
page_contents.training_page: EQ-i 2.0 and EQ 360 (emotional intelligence) Certification | The Emotional Intelligence Training Company Skip to content Emotional intelligence competencies are critical skills that are highly correlated with performance and wellbeing Emotional Intelligence skills are critical skills for leadership, team effectiveness, work performance, influence, work/life balance and wellbeing. CERTIFICATION SERVICES MENU Overview Developing EQ What is the EQ 360? What is the EQ-i 2.0? FAQ Get EQ-i 2.0 / EQ 360 Certified The Emotional Quotient Inventory (EQ-i 2.0) is the world’s leading measure of emotional intelligence, applying decades of research to support effective human performance and development. The fifteen competencies in the scientifically validated EQ-i 2.0 model are highly correlated with inspirational leadership, innovative work cultures, highly-effective teams, and engaged and committed talent. And the best news – these are learned skills that we can develop and improve! Online certification (Developing EQ in brackets) April 20-23 (27-28) May 19-22 (26-27) June 22-25 (29-30) July 20-23 (27-28) ONLINE CERTIFICATION Become an EQ-i 2.0 ® Certified Practitioner EITC has been an industry leader in Emotional Intelligence Certification for over 25 years. As one of the first Master Trainers with MHS, when you certify with EITC, you get so much more than certification. You get 25 years worth of knowledge, skills, application and real life examples of the value and the impact of developing emotional intelligence. EITC provides you with everything you need to administer, interpret, debrief and coach the EQ-i 2.0/EQ 360 with employees, leaders and clients. The comprehensive and customizable EQ-i report that is generated is the foundation to develop tailored emotional intelligence programs for employees, clients, leaders and teams. The results enable you to make informed decisions with your employees and clients about their performance and future development. EQ-i 2.0 / EQ 360 Certification EQ-i 2.0 / EQ 360 Certification This online certification course is four half days. Learn More Developing EQ (2 half-days following EQ-i Certification) If you are an HR professional, Learning and Development professional, coach, trainer or consultant, this one day course will support your EQ certification. This valuable EQ development course offers innovative ways to deepen and apply your knowledge, skills and competencies. You will receive everything you need to expand your own und
